video_job.actor_prompt: Cinematic shot in a warm wood Japanese fantasy RPG arcane library; Natsu Ashbell, a feminine frontline adventurer in reinforced leather armor and a short guild cloak, stands opposite Natsu Dawncrest, a masculine mage in layered blue robes and neat gloves. They both raise their hands in a synchronized, harmless spell practice, with soft, glowing mana ribbons beginning to weave between their palms. High quality, readable body motion, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous shot in the arcane library; Natsu Dawncrest carefully adjusts his hand position, causing the glowing mana ribbons to stabilize into a calm, steady flow between him and Natsu Ashbell. Both characters maintain a focused, cooperative expression, demonstrating teamwork in their magical research. No combat, no harm, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The prompts depict non-sexual, cooperative fantasy spellcasting. All content is safe, avoids prohibited themes, and explicitly excludes text, subtitles, and watermarks to ensure compliance.

timeline_story.selection_reason: Synchronizing mana to stabilize the floating spellbooks caused by the recent arcane relic research.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Successful teamwork during a library mana hazard.
Valued the frontline support in stabilizing arcane anomalies.
